questionTextSource: What is documented on the driver qualification card?
explanationSource: Professional drivers who work in the transport of goods or passengers on public roads require an initial qualification and then regular further training. The validity of these trainings are documented on the driver qualification certificate.
explanationTarget: Jamoat yo‘llarida yuk yoki yo‘lovchi tashishda ishlaydigan professional haydovchilar boshlang‘ich malaka va keyin muntazam malaka oshirishdan o‘tishlari kerak. Ushbu malaka va o‘quvlarning amal qilish muddati haydovchi malaka kartasida hujjatlashtiriladi.
